title: boAt Airdopes 141 True Wireless Earbuds
description: Indulge in extended weekend breaks with Airdopes 141, providing up to 42 hours of playback time, including 6 hours of nonstop playtime for the earbuds. Immerse yourself in real-time audio and a low latency entertainment experience with BEAST mode, making Airdopes 141 your perfect gaming companion. Delve into your cherished boAt immersive auditory experience with Airdopes 141. Equipped with ASAP Charge, the earbuds offer up to 75 min of playtime with just 5 min of charging, and the carry case comes with a Type C interface. Start your day seamlessly by connecting to your morning playlists using Insta Wake N' Pair technology, which powers on the earbuds as soon as you open the case cover. The TWS earbuds' body is protected with an IPX4 rating, providing resistance against water and sweat.

product_description: Product Dimensions:‎5 x 5 x 2 cm; 60 Grams
description: Introducing the Boat Airdopes 141 in Bold Black, the ultimate wireless earbuds for music lovers on the go. These sleek and stylish earbuds are designed to provide you with a truly immersive audio experience, allowing you to enjoy your favorite tunes with crystal clear sound quality. With a comfortable and secure fit, you can wear these earbuds for hours on end without any discomfort. The Boat Airdopes 141 also come equipped with the latest Bluetooth technology, ensuring a seamless and stable connection to your device. Whether you're working out at the gym or commuting to work, these earbuds will stay in place and deliver exceptional sound every time. Additionally, the Boat Airdopes 141 feature touch controls, allowing you to easily adjust the volume, skip tracks, and answer calls with just a tap. With a long-lasting battery life, you can enjoy up to 4 hours of continuous playback on a single charge. The included charging case provides an additional 12 hours of battery life, ensuring that your music never stops. Say goodbye to tangled wires and hello to the freedom of wireless listening with the Boat Airdopes 141 in Bold Black. Upgrade your audio experience today and immerse yourself in the world of music like never before.

title: Customized Boat Airdopes 141
boAt Airdopes 141 Gen 2
description: Elevate your listening experience with the boAt Airdopes 141 Gen 2 Wireless Earbuds, packed with cutting-edge features like up to like powerful 10mm drivers, and a massive 48 hours of total playback. Enjoy crystal-clear calls, Signature and Balanced EQ Modes to suit your mood, and experience ultra-smooth audio with BEAST Mode and 65ms low latency—perfect for gaming and streaming. The sleek, glossy finish adds a touch of style, while IWP Tech ensures instant pairing the moment you open the case. Built to withstand everyday splashes with an IPX4 rating and powered by Bluetooth v5.4, the Airdopes 141 Gen 2 is your perfect all-day, all-activity audio companion.

title: boAt Airdopes 141 Pro
description: The configuration consists of discrete left and right in‐ear units with molded housings, low‐profile nozzles and replaceable silicone ear tips. Each housing integrates an individual driver assembly, acoustic outlets with protective mesh, microphone apertures and status LEDs. Earbud undersides feature electrical contact pads for charging and integrated rechargeable cells. Exterior surfaces carry model markings and a matte black finish.

title: boAt Airdopes 141 True Wireless Earbuds
description: Indulge in extended weekend breaks with Airdopes 141, providing up to 42 hours of playback time, including 6 hours of nonstop playtime for the earbuds. Immerse yourself in real-time audio and a low latency entertainment experience with BEAST mode, making Airdopes 141 your perfect gaming companion. Delve into your cherished boAt immersive auditory experience with Airdopes 141. Equipped with ASAP Charge, the earbuds offer up to 75 min of playtime with just 5 min of charging, and the carry case comes with a Type C interface. Start your day seamlessly by connecting to your morning playlists using Insta Wake N' Pair technology, which powers on the earbuds as soon as you open the case cover. The TWS earbuds' body is protected with an IPX4 rating, providing resistance against water and sweat.
